author: h21465
description: Display file statistics (URLs, Links) and EOF indicator at the end of markdown files. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Hayato Yamamoto
manifest.description: Display file statistics (URLs, Links) and EOF indicator at the end of markdown files.
manifest.name: EOF Stats

name: EOF Stats

releases.author: H21465
releases.description:
## Features
  - Display unique URL count
  - Display unique internal link count
  - EOF indicator at end of markdown files
  - Customizable colors
  - Works in both Live Preview and Reading View
releases.name: Initial release
